name: Humans
description: The most numerous people of the City, divided into myriad proud houses. Name your own house — its sigil and motto are yours to define.
areteTriggers: Defeat a member of a rival house in a fair tournament or duel.

kins.name: A Noble House
kins.description: Your house — you choose its name, its sigil, and its motto. Two adventurers of the same house may even be kin by blood.

name: Fay
description: The fair folk — elves and gnomes touched by the far realms, where every archetype burns brighter.
areteTriggers: Kill something without using a weapon.
Make someone you have kissed cry.

kins.name: High Elf
kins.description: Long-lived courtiers of the elder houses, with memories that never fade.

kins.name: Wood Elf
kins.description: Wardens of the deep forests, with the eyes of hawks and the noses of wolves.

kins.name: Dark Elf
kins.description: Dwellers of the twilight roads beneath the earth, gifted with prophetic hunches.

kins.name: Gnome
kins.description: Small, curious, and impossibly well-informed hedge-folk.

name: Underfolk
description: Peoples of the hills and deeps — dwarves, halflings, and trolls — makers and keepers of lasting things.
areteTriggers: Craft something that will last for centuries.
Recover a precious gem or work of fine art and hoard it as a grave good.

kins.name: Dwarf
kins.description: Stout smiths and delvers who can labor through the night.

kins.name: Halfling
kins.description: Comfort-loving gentlefolk who make excellent diplomats — and better dinners.

kins.name: Troll
kins.description: Slow-spoken giants of the border country, far stronger than anyone else in the room.

name: Orcs
description: The blooded peoples, each kin's veins running with a different element. Their strange blood answers when they are hurt.
areteTriggers: Hoard a skull from a class of monster your guild has never killed before.
Hoard a treasure of great worth.
Slay a monster at least twice your size.

kins.name: Earthblooded
kins.description: Unmovable as the mountains — their quicksilver blood eats the weapons that cut them.

kins.name: Fireblooded
kins.description: Quick to burn — wounds kindle a berserker's rage.

kins.name: Seablooded
kins.description: Tidal and patient — their black blood poisons whatever bites them.

kins.name: Stormblooded
kins.description: Loud and sudden — wounded, their blood rises as concealing mist.
